mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name FROM deck WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name FROM deck WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE deck SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM deck WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
